clues.text: Settling in, as robins in spring
Simmering — like beef, or a grudge-holder
In the works, like trouble or tea
Winding up, as a garden hose
Settling matters of honor at ten paces
Light snowfall — or a light chore
What a movie crew is doing on set
Paying the landlord instead of the bank
Slowly turning orange, as old iron
Riding the thermals, as an eagle
On the road, as a band
Like some flakes and birthday cakes
Going after trout — or a compliment
Free of clutter — or of charges
Circled, as the moon does Earth
Cooked over coals — or questioned hard
Declaring a field of study, with 'in'
Core exercise you hold rather than count
Rude thing to do with a finger
Giving an old track a new spin
In the lineup at first pitch
Trying stage for babies and parents alike
Vetted — or shown at a festival
Filling and capping, at a brewery
Handler with a hooded hunting bird
